tickets.fetchCommand: claude --print "Fetch the ticket $TICKET_KEY from our project management tool. Return ONLY a JSON object with fields: key, summary, description, acceptanceCriteria (array of strings), linkedDocs (array of URLs), subtasks (array of {key, summary}). No markdown, just raw JSON."

docs.fetchCommand: claude --print "Fetch the document at $DOC_URL. Return ONLY a JSON object with fields: title, url, content (the full text content). No markdown, just raw JSON."
